info.name: SAP Sales and Distribution (SD) SAP Sales Inquiry API

description.content:
Read sales inquiries from SAP S/4HANA. This OData service (API_SALES_INQUIRY_SRV) provides access to sales inquiry documents used in the pre-sales process to capture customer interest in products or services. Inquiries can be converted to quotations or sales orders.

Contact Support:
 Name: SAP Support
